raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies a specific prior work (Bai et al., 2022) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or provide a detailed comparison.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific recommendations for additional citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the novelty claim and the exact titles/years of cited works, providing a clear indication of what needs verification.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or coverage of unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and provides detailed recommendations to avoid potential issues in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies a specific prior work (Bai et al., 2022) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or provide a detailed comparison.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides specific recommendations for additional citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the novelty claim and the exact titles/years of cited works, providing a clear indication of what needs verification.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or coverage of unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and provides detailed recommendations to avoid potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications.
